title: file_batch_workflow complex eval record
description: One evaluation record: a workflow input paired with the expected output keywords.

task_instructions.description: The task_instructions string passed to DeepWorkflowConfig.

files.description: List of file paths (relative to the dataset root, e.g. data/parsers/csv_parser.py) included in the evaluation run.

expected_output.description: Map of file stem to semicolon-separated keywords that must appear in the corresponding report file for the sample to pass.
